fields.summary: Specifies the component swizzle mapping for a Vulkan YCbCr conversion.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`GRVkYcbcrComponents` holds the per-channel swizzle indices used when creating a Vulkan YCbCr sampler conversion. Each component (`R`, `G`, `B`, `A`) specifies which Vulkan component it reads from, using the `VkComponentSwizzle` numeric values defined by the Vulkan specification.

This struct is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var components = new GRVkYcbcrComponents
{
    R = 0, // VK_COMPONENT_SWIZZLE_IDENTITY
    G = 0,
    B = 0,
    A = 0,
};
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the swizzle mapping for the alpha component.
fields.value: A <see langword="uint" /> representing the Vulkan component swizzle for the alpha channel.
